title: Power Plant Operators
description: Control, operate, or maintain machinery to generate electric power. Includes auxiliary equipment operators.

tasks.text: Control generator output to match the phase, frequency, or voltage of electricity supplied to panels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Take regulatory action, based on readings from charts, meters and gauges, at established intervals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Control power generating equipment, including boilers, turbines, generators, or reactors, using control boards or semi-automatic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start or stop generators, auxiliary pumping equipment, turbines, or other power plant equipment as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor power plant equipment and indicators to detect evidence of operating problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate or maintain distributed power generation equipment, including fuel cells or microturbines, to produce energy on-site for manufacturing or other commercial purposes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open and close valves and switches in sequence to start or shut down auxiliary units.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Control or maintain auxiliary equipment, such as pumps, fans, compressors, condensers, feedwater heaters, filters, or chlorinators, to supply water, fuel, lubricants, air, or auxiliary power.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Regulate equipment operations and conditions, such as water levels, based on instrument data or from computers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect records or log book entries or communicate with plant personnel to assess equipment operating status.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Clean, lubricate, or maintain equipment, such as generators, turbines, pumps, or compressors, to prevent failure or deterioration.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record and compile operational data by completing and maintaining forms, logs, or reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Make adjustments or minor repairs, such as tightening leaking gland or pipe joints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust controls to generate specified electrical power or to regulate the flow of power between generating stations and substations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate, control, or monitor equipment, such as acid or gas carbon dioxide removal units, carbon dioxide compressors, or pipelines, to capture, store, or transport carbon dioxide exhaust.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Operate, control, or monitor gasifiers or related equipment, such as coolers, water quenches, water gas shifts reactors, or sulfur recovery units, to produce syngas or electricity from coal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate with systems operators to regulate and coordinate line voltages and transmission loads and frequencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate, control, or monitor integrated gasification combined cycle (IGCC) or related equipment, such as air separation units, to generate electricity from coal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Receive outage calls and request necessary personnel during power outages or emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect oil, water, or electrolyte samples for laboratory analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine and test electrical power distribution machinery and equipment, using testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place standby emergency electrical generators on line in emergencies and monitor the temperature, output, and lubrication of the system.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze the layout, instrumentation, or function of electrical generation or transmission facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Diagnose or troubleshoot problems with gas collection systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor well fields periodically to ensure proper functioning and performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate landfill gas, methane, or natural gas fueled electrical generation systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit compliance, operational, and safety forms or reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace gas piping.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trace electrical circuitry to ensure compliance of electrical systems with applicable codes or laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify that well field monitoring data conforms to applicable regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
